item.title: Writing a DNS Server in Rust
item.description: I really don’t know if this is a good idea, but I am going to write a DNS server in Rust and dogfood it for a while. The absolute goal of this project would be to run this as a local adblocker on my laptop, something like a Pi Hole. The server would need to have the following functional requirements: Return replies for the following types of records: A AAAA CNAME PTR Cache replies returned previously with a suitable TTL Search using third-party servers like cloudflare and google and cache-and-forward the results for unknown domains Have a blocklist feature to block resolution of certain domain names Run on both TCP and UDP The server would have the following non-functional requirements:
